name: 12q23_IGF1_SD
description: 12q23.2 segmental duplication interval flanking IGF1 and the surrounding insulin-like growth factor regulatory region. Contains short SDs and processed-pseudogene-derived paralogs of IGF1 distributed across the genome.

architecture.internal_structure: Short SDs of 5-20 kb at 90-94% identity; processed-pseudogene-derived IGF1 paralogs; family-internal SDs to IGF2 (11p15.5).
